title: Should foreign employees in India contribute to EPF? Supreme Court to examine
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday agreed to examine whether foreign employees working in India are required to contribute to the Employees’ Provident Fund (EPF) under the Employees’ Provident Fund Scheme, 1952 [LG Electronics Vs Union of India].A Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe issued notice to the Central government on a plea filed by LG Electronics challenging the validity of paragraph 83 of the EPF Scheme, which governs provident fund contributions by 'international workers'.
